semantic.role: TypeScript module defining shared type contracts for the ArchSpine initialization and repository bootstrapping subsystem.
responsibilities: Defines the InitSharedOptions interface that encapsulates dependencies (Config, RuntimeService) and utilities for initialization steps.
Defines the RepositoryBootstrapResult interface for structured results of repository bootstrapping operations.
Exports type aliases (LLMScope, HookSetupStatus, ArtifactStrategy) that standardize configuration domains across the initialization CLI.
Provides centralized type definitions to ensure consistency between CLI commands and service layers during project setup.
outOfScope: Implementing initialization logic or business rules.
Handling CLI command parsing or execution.
invariants: Must remain a pure type definition module with no executable code.
Must not import or depend on concrete implementations outside of type references.
Must serve as a central contract for initialization-related data structures.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Decouple type definitions from implementation to enable shared contracts across CLI and service layers, supporting consistent project initialization.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Tighten schema handling for initialization types, likely improving type safety and contract definitions.
